Petition For Approval Of Compromise Of Claim
Off Calendar Mar-01-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for Plaintiff's motion for compromise of claim of Minor, Dejon Rochell.

Dept. 505; Judge Lydia Villarreal; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:19 am and concluding at 9:26 am.

Petitioner Adriane Garvin is present via zoom video conference, represented by Agatha Panday, Esq., placed under oath and testified.
Defendant Theaster Jones is not present.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents brief recitation of case.
Guardian ad Litem is examined by the Court.

The matter is submitted.

The Court finds the settlement is reasonable and the Guardian ad Litem confirms it is in the best interest of the claimant.

The court hereby APPROVES Plaintiff's Motion for Compromise of Claim for the settlement amount of $26,700.00 minus the following:

1. $6,675.00 for Attorney's Fees

Balance of settlement in the sum of $20,025.00 shall be deposited in a blocked account at Patelco Credit Union, 65 Southgate Avenue, Daly City, CA 94015.

The Plaintiff is authorized and directed to execute all documents reasonably necessary to carry out the terms of the settlement.

Proposed Orders Approving Compromise of Claim or Action or Disposition of Proceeds of Judgment for Minor or Person with a Disability and to Deposit Funds in Blocked Account are signed and filed this date.

Court orders matter continued to April 29, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 505 for progress report on the deposit of funds in a blocked account. (D505)
